label: Age group at 2021
notes: Based on age during study period (age_at_2021). Individuals <18 or >100 excluded. Use '50-64' NOT '50-65'.

label: Birth sex
notes: Transgender individuals (FM/MF) excluded due to very small N and model instability. Significant in CIF during vaccine only (p=0.04).

label: Race/ethnicity
notes: Hispanic includes all races. NHB = Non-Hispanic Black. NHW = Non-Hispanic White. Other = multiple races Asian Native American Pacific Islander.

label: Place of birth (US-born)
notes: Yes includes: USA PRI VIR UMI GUM (territories). Missing birth_country_cd coded as missing.

label: HIV transmission category
reference_category_in_models: MSM (coded 'M' in CLASS ref= in original code - update to 'MSM' if values recoded)
notes: IDU includes MSM-IDU (trans_categ='03'). Other = perinatal unknown blood transfusion NIR.

label: Viral suppression status 2020
notes: Used in BEFORE vaccine models. CRITICAL: always use ref='1'. Using ref='0' inverts direction of HR.

label: Viral suppression status 2021
notes: Used in DURING vaccine models. CRITICAL: always use ref='1'. Using ref='0' inverts direction of HR.

label: Rural-urban classification
notes: Derived from ruca2010florida.xlsx. Urban = RUCA codes 1/1.1/2/2.1/3/4.1/5.1/7.1/8.1/10.1. Rural = all others.

label: SVI overall tertile
source: CDC SVI replicated at ZCTA level (2020 ACS)
notes: Low = RPL_THEMES 0.000-0.333; Medium = 0.334-0.666; High = 0.667-1.000. Values of -999 excluded.

label: SVI Theme 1: Socioeconomic status
source: CDC SVI replicated at ZCTA level (2020 ACS)
notes: Based on RPL_THEME1. Tertile cutoffs same as overall SVI.

label: SVI Theme 2: Household composition and disability
source: CDC SVI replicated at ZCTA level (2020 ACS)
notes: Based on RPL_THEME2.

label: SVI Theme 3: Minority status and language
source: CDC SVI replicated at ZCTA level (2020 ACS)
notes: Based on RPL_THEME3.

label: SVI Theme 4: Housing type and transportation
source: CDC SVI replicated at ZCTA level (2020 ACS)
notes: Based on RPL_THEME4.

label: County % population >=5 vaccinated by Dec 31 2021
notes: Mean-centered using PROC STDIZE method=mean. Entered as continuous in Final Models.

label: Competing risk censoring indicator
notes: eventcode=1 in PROC PHREG subdistribution models. censor1(0) in model statement.

label: Time from risk origin (months)
notes: After March at-risk adjustment: time_diff = max(0 time_diff - 2). Month 0 = March 2020. Month 14 approx = vaccine start (May 2021).

label: Underlying cause of death category
notes: COVID = ICD-10 U07.1. other = all other causes. alive = no death recorded.

label: Multiple imputation weight
notes: Applied as WEIGHT mi_weight in all PROC PHREG models. Weighted event counts (Tables 2-5) differ from unweighted Table 1 counts.

label: ZIP Code Tabulation Area
source: eHARS residence at death or most recent
notes: Priority: rs20211231_zip_cd -> rs20191231_zip_cd -> rad_zip_cd. 2020 ZCTA used for those alive at end of 2021 with missing 2021 ZCTA.

label: Florida county name
notes: Cleaned from eHARS raw county name field (e.g. 'MIAMI-DADE CO.' -> 'Dade'). Used to merge vaccination rates.

label: SVI overall score (ZCTA level)
notes: Underlying continuous score; categorized into theme tertiles for models.
